docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER THE REQEUST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF DENISE CARRET IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN HEALY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
